_comment: A faithful agent run: correct method/charge/solvent, reports the true energy with computed provenance, surfaces the integrity verdict. Expected: OVERALL PASS.
prose: Using GFN2-xTB in the gas phase (charge 0, multiplicity 1), the single-point total electronic energy of water is -137.97182 eV. This is a computed value; the engine's integrity check reports the result as trustworthy.
